title: pouteria congolensis
intro: Pouteria congolensis, also known as the African Mahogany or Okoume, is a tree species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Sapotaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Pouteria congolensis has been found to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Pouteria congolensis include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat various ailments in traditional African medicine.
